'''Lamarebb''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Lamaro system]]. It was very close to the sun, [[Lamaro]], and orbited close to the second planet, [[Lamarecc]].

Every fourteen years, Lamarebb and Lamarecc approached each other until almost rubbing. This caused a natural phenomenom of lights in the skies of the third planet of the system, [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]], and also scrambled communications.

Like the other planets in the system, Lamarebb probably owed its etymology to a notation in an old [[Star map/Legends|star map]].
